# How Many Podcasts Are There? (2025 Stats & Trends)

Explore the latest podcast statistics, including listener trends, ad performance, platform usage and what they mean for your business.

![Key stats on the number of podcasts. Featured image for Podcast Statistics.](https://www.digitalsilk.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/how-many-podcasts-are-there-featured-image-1200x600.jpg "podcast-statistics-featured-image")
![Jordan Park](https://www.digitalsilk.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/Jordan-150x150.jpg "Jordan Park")

## Podcast Statistics — Key Highlights

There are approximately 3.55 million podcasts and over 175 million episodes available globally in 2025.

Podcast listeners worldwide are projected to reach 651.7 million by 2027, showing steady industry growth.

46% of weekly podcast listeners have made a purchase after hearing an ad, highlighting the format’s strong marketing potential.

Podcasting has emerged as **one of the most popular forms of digital media**, drawing in millions of listeners each month.

In fact, a 2024 survey showed that [55%](https://www.statista.com/statistics/270365/audio-podcast-consumption-in-the-us/) of Americans have either listened to or watched a podcast within the last month.

With such a wide reach, it’s no surprise **more creators enter the podcasting space every day**.

This article breaks down the latest podcast statistics to answer one key question: How many podcasts are there?

For brands and business leaders, **understanding the scale of podcasting is key** to spotting growth opportunities and connecting with engaged audiences.

Table of Contents

## How Many Podcasts Are There In 2025?

The audio content boom has turned podcasts into a major force in global media. With **new shows launching every day and millions of episodes available** across platforms, listeners have more variety than ever.

Whether it’s comedy, news or niche interests, there’s a podcast for nearly every audience.

The format continues to attract creators, brands and marketers looking to build loyal communities through audio:

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Podcast Listener Statistics

From morning commutes to evening workouts, **podcasts have become a key part of how people consume content** throughout the day.

Listeners span generations, preferences and platforms, each engaging with audio in their own way.

The following podcast listener statistics reveal who’s listening and how habits are evolving:

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Podcast Length Statistics

When it comes to podcasting, there’s no one-size-fits-all approach to episode length. Some shows thrive on **short, bite-sized content**, while others **dive deep into long-form conversations**.

Listener preferences vary, but the majority tend to engage with episodes that last over half an hour.

The podcast length statistics below break down just how long most episodes run and what that means for creators and marketers alike:

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Podcast Advertising Statistics

Podcast advertising has become **one of the most effective channels for reaching engaged, niche audiences**.

Unlike traditional ads, podcast promotions often feel personal, especially when read by the host. This approach helps build trust and drive action.

As ad spending continues to grow, so does the impact of podcast advertising on consumer behavior.

These podcast advertising statistics shed light on the channel’s reach, influence and revenue potential:

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Podcast Growth Statistics

Podcasting isn’t just a trend — it’s a **fast-growing global industry** with no signs of slowing down.

As listenership climbs and user penetration expands, both media companies and advertisers take notice.

Future projections show **steady increases in audience size, market value and overall adoption worldwide**.

Let’s explore the key podcast growth statistics that show just how far this medium is expected to go:

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Most Popular Podcast Platforms

The way listeners access podcasts has evolved, with **platforms constantly competing to become the go-to choice** for audiences.

From traditional podcast apps to video-first platforms, the landscape is more dynamic than ever. User preferences, platform features and exclusive content all play a role in shaping where people choose to tune in.

The following **Spotify and Apple Podcasts** statistics offer a closer look at how these platforms stack up in today’s market.

### What These Numbers Mean For You

## Grow Your Business Online With Digital Silk

The latest podcast statistics highlight just how rapidly the **industry is expanding across listeners, content and revenue**.

More people are tuning in, advertisers are spending more, and platforms are investing heavily in podcast development. With so much growth happening globally, podcasting has become a vital space for both creators and marketers.

Staying informed on podcast trends and listener habits helps you **spot new opportunities as the industry evolves**.

## BLOG ARTICLE

# 32 Podcast Advertising Statistics To Know About In 2025 And Beyond

Last updated: 8/15/2025

Last updated: 8/15/2025

The podcast advertising market is growing, with many twists and turns in recent years. It is currently one of the go-to markets for marketers and brands looking to reach quality audiences.

Since introducing true crime shows in 2014, the podcast advertising market has grown in popularity and has become the battleground for brands and marketers. For this, understanding the nuances and changes in podcast advertising statistics and [trends](https://podsqueeze.com/blog/2024-podcasting-trends/) is more important than ever.

In this guide, we have scoured the web to compile essential statistics about podcast advertising. From podcast ads spend to podcast ads ROI and other general podcast ads statistics, here is the most important guide you need to get started.

## Podcast Ads Format Stats

There are host-read ads, programmatic ads, pre-roll ads, mid-roll ads, post-roll ads, dynamic ads, sponsored segments, etc. But, it's no news that some of these ad formats perform better than others. Here are stats about these ad formats;

## Wrapping Up

Existing brands and new ones in the podcast advertising market are spending more money on podcast advertising and it’s a trend that seems to not dying soon. These stats are presented as a deep dive into the nuances and changes in podcast advertising to understand the landscape of podcasts in the digital audio advertising industry.

## Go Beyond Podcast Ads Statistics And Start Implementing Your Podcast Strategy

![podsqueeze-podcast-features](https://podsqueeze.com/blog/how-to-create-audiograms-podcast/podsqueezecontent.webp)

![podsqueeze-podcast-features](https://podsqueeze.com/blog/how-to-create-audiograms-podcast/podsqueezecontent.webp)

As podcasters, you can read everything about podcast ads, from podcast sponsorship to its [best practices](https://podsqueeze.com/blog/15-podcast-best-pactices/), but the best result comes from actually growing your podcast to be part of these big earners. By using Podsqueeze to accelerate your podcast marketing and [repurposing your episodes](https://podsqueeze.com/blog/how-to-repurpose-and-promote-a-podcast-on-social-media/) on social media, you can increase the popularity of your podcast and position yourself for bigger podcast ads revenue.

Create a [free account](https://podsqueeze.com/register/) to get started!

## FAQs On Podcast Advertising Statistics

### How Successful is Podcast Advertising in 2025?

Podcast advertising has seen remarkable success in recent years, with many brands investing a significant of their marketing budget in podcast ads. This is because of the quality of podcast listeners who are highly engaged and actively seeking out content they are interested in. This makes them more receptive to advertising messages. Additionally, podcasts cover a wide range of topics and genres, allowing advertisers to target specific audiences based on their interests, demographics, and listening habits. If you're looking to keep track of your ad spend and measure ROI, [download CoHost's free podcast ad planner](https://www.cohostpodcasting.com/free-downloadables/podcast-ad-planner).

### How Big Is The Podcast Advertising Market?

The podcast advertising market has been steadily increasing year over year representing about 4% of the global advertising market. This market is projected to continue expanding in the coming years as the podcast landscape grows, increasing advertiser interest, and advancements in advertising technology.

### Who Are The Largest Advertisers of Podcasts?

Amazon is the biggest spender ($8,102,400) on podcast ads as of October 2024 and BetterHelp comes a close second ($7,895,000). These advertisers encompass a diverse range of industries and brands, each leveraging the unique benefits of podcast advertising to reach their target audiences.

--- SOURCE 3: The Future Features Growth Says PwC, Seeing 10% Increases For ... ---
URL: https://www.podcastnewsdaily.com/news/the-future-features-growth-says-pwc-seeing-10-increases-for-podcasting-through-2027/article_a11ecb64-111e-11ee-84f1-13aff2ad0c2a.html

SUMMARY:
PwC forecasts that during the next five years, the global listener base will grow at a 7.4% annual rate to 1.4 billion in 2027.

FULL CONTENT:
![site-logo](https://bloximages.newyork1.vip.townnews.com/podcastnewsdaily.com/content/tncms/custom/image/7f96b522-4b05-11ed-ba68-07939910f25a.jpg?resize=200%2C29)
![site-logo](https://bloximages.newyork1.vip.townnews.com/podcastnewsdaily.com/content/tncms/custom/image/e178a69a-e351-11ec-a31e-f36b3d81d51a.jpg?resize=200%2C39)
![pwc 220](https://bloximages.newyork1.vip.townnews.com/podcastnewsdaily.com/content/tncms/assets/v3/editorial/c/22/c226e33c-111e-11ee-b20e-1b491cede142/64947f0489aa4.image.jpg)

# The Future Features Growth Says PwC, Seeing 10% Increases For Podcasting Through 2027.

![pwc 220](https://bloximages.newyork1.vip.townnews.com/podcastnewsdaily.com/content/tncms/assets/v3/editorial/c/22/c226e33c-111e-11ee-b20e-1b491cede142/64947f0489aa4.image.jpg)

U.S. podcast revenue is projected to grow 15% this year and continue climbing through the next several years as the industry posts gains and approaches the $2 billion revenue mark albeit at a pace slightly slower than previously predicted. PwC annual Global Entertainment & Media Outlook forecasts U.S. podcast revenue of $1.389 billion this year. And by 2027, PwC estimates podcast revenue will total $1.952 billion. “Over the next five years, revenue in the U.S. will increase at a 10.1% CAGR to reach close to $2 billion in 2027,” the report says. If accurate, that would represent a tripling of industry revenue from 2018 levels.

![](http://www.insideradio.com/app/Podcast/PWC6-22.jpg)

“Podcast adverts are generally well received by listeners, with 46% of monthly listeners stating that ads of this kind are not intrusive at all,” PwC says, noting Infinite Dial research. It says the U.S. is home to the largest podcast advertising market globally, “dwarfing” second-place China, whose podcast industry had an estimated $374 million in revenue in 2022.

PwC says it is not only revenue that will continue to increase, but so too will listeners. It projects that during the next five years the number of U.S. monthly podcast listeners will grow at an annual rate of 3.3%. By its estimates, that means monthly podcast listeners in the U.S. will climb from 157 million in 2022 to reach 185 million in 2027.

Yet it is China, not the U.S., where the largest population of podcast listeners resides. PwC says due to the sheer size of its population, China has the largest monthly listener base globally. Ximalaya is the largest audio platform in China, boasting an average daily usage time of 144 minutes. The U.S. may be second today, but PwC projects India will overtake it in 2024.

The number of monthly podcast listeners hit 992 million globally in 2022, up 14.9% on the previous year,” the report says. PwC forecasts that during the next five years, the global listener base will grow at a 7.4% annual rate to 1.4 billion in 2027.

Even as podcast listening rates grow rapidly in India, it has a long way to go to overtake the U.S. in terms of podcast advertising. PwC says the U.S. is “by far” the largest podcast advertising market, accounting for 56% of global podcast ad revenue in 2022. The firm predicts “its dominance will endure” through the next five years. “In fact, just two markets, the U.S. and China, will account for around three-quarters of sector revenue in 2027,” says PwC.

On a global scale, podcast advertising is forecast to grow at a 9.6% annual rate as worldwide revenue climbs from $2.2 billion in 2022 to $3.4 billion in 2027. “While some this growth is incremental, there will be a level of cannibalization of advertising revenue from other audio areas, particularly talk radio,” the report adds.

**Radio Growing More Slowly Than Podcasting**

Beyond podcasting, U.S. radio industry ad revenues are [forecast to grow at a modest pace](https://www.insideradio.com/free/pwc-u-s-broadcast-radio-ad-sales-to-reach-16-6-billion-in-2027/article_eb4cb73c-10c9-11ee-89a6-5349c65b960d.html) through 2027. PwC says broadcast radio’s combined over the air and online audio ad sales are on track to rise from $15.8 billion in 2022 to $16.6 billion in 2027, at a compound annual growth rate of 0.9%. When subscription revenue from satellite radio is factored in, total radio revenue is expected to increase from $21.9 billion in 2022 to $23.2 billion in 2027. That amounts to a compound annual growth rate of 1.2%.

That total $21.9 billion for last year makes the U.S. the world’s largest radio market by far, accounting for 53.5% of the radio segment’s global revenue.

“Despite the challenges coming from competing audio streaming services, radio still remains an extremely popular medium,” the report says. It cites Nielsen data showing AM/FM radio with a monthly reach of 93% of the U.S. adult 18+ population (234 million listeners), compared to 52% for streaming music services and 13% for satellite radio.

Number of podcast listeners worldwide 2023-2027
===============================================

 Published by [Patrick Leu](https://www.statista.com/aboutus/our-research-commitment),  Jan 14, 2025 

[](https://www.statista.com/statistics/1291360/podcast-listeners-worldwide/#statisticContainer)
According to a forecast from August 2023 on global podcast consumption, the number of podcast listeners worldwide has steadily increased and is predicted to rise even further. In 2023, the number of podcast listeners worldwide amounted to over 500 million internet users, while this number was predicted to grow to more than 650 million in 2027.

enriched_points.expanded_content: The podcast audience is projected to exceed 650 million globally by 2027, reflecting a significant growth trend in digital audio consumption.
Advertiser interest in podcasts is surging, with projected ad spending anticipated to reach approximately $5 billion by 2027, highlighting the medium's unique engagement capabilities.
Podcasting offers immense potential for targeting niche markets, allowing brands to reach highly engaged audiences with tailored content across diverse interests.
